qBittorrent vendor copy

This folder contains an unmodified Windows copy of qBittorrent v5.0.3 from:
E:\Program Files\qBittorrent

Included files:
- qbittorrent.exe
- qt.conf
- translations/

Project: https://www.qbittorrent.org/
Source code: https://github.com/qbittorrent/qBittorrent
License: GNU General Public License v2.0 or later, with the OpenSSL linking exception stated by the qBittorrent project.

Do not edit the binary in this project. For broader redistribution, keep this notice with the app and provide the matching qBittorrent source/license information.
